Tests the behavior of `Math.ceil` with negative zero in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion statement that tests the behavior of the `Math.ceil` function in JavaScript. It checks if dividing 1 by the result of `Math.ceil` applied to negative zero (`-0`) yields negative infinity (`-Infinity`). This test is narrow in scope, focusing specifically on the mathematical operation involving `Math.ceil` and its handling of negative zero. The assertion ensures that the JavaScript engine correctly implements this aspect of the IEEE 754 standard for floating-point arithmetic.
